---
name: Enhancement Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for PQC-Share
title: "[ENHANCEMENT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: batt0s

---

## Summary
A brief one-line description of the feature or improvement.
 
## Motivation
Why is this needed? What problem does it solve, or what use case does it enable?
 
## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.
 
## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why did you prefer the proposed one?
 
## Additional Context
Any relevant references, related issues, or mockups.
